$comment: Settings contract: keys, types, defaults, labels, descriptions, and CSS-var bindings. Read by Rust (apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/config.rs) via include_str! and by the frontend via a static import (lib/settings-schema.ts). Theme preset *values* are not part of the contract — they live in shared/themes/*.json, one file per preset. Per docs/consolidation.md: do not declare defaults, labels, or types anywhere else.

settings.label: Font Size
settings.description: Font size in pixels for the editor

settings.label: Line Height
settings.description: Line height multiplier for the editor

settings.label: Sidebar File Label
settings.description: Show the document title or the filename for files in the sidebar

settings.label: Preset
settings.$comment: Valid values are populated at runtime from shared/themes/*.json plus the special "custom" sentinel; we intentionally don't enum-constrain the contract so adding a preset doesn't require a schema edit.

settings.label: UI font
settings.default: -apple-system-body, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, "Apple Color Emoji", Arial, sans-serif, "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

settings.label: Editor font
settings.description: Light theme editor body font stack
settings.default: -apple-system-body, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, "Apple Color Emoji", Arial, sans-serif, "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

settings.label: Contrast
settings.description: alpha multiplier on borders, cards, hover bgs.

settings.label: Preset

settings.label: File Associations
settings.description: File patterns to include in the workspace

settings.label: Insert Final Newline
settings.description: Ensure files end with a newline when saving

settings.label: Trim Trailing Whitespace
settings.description: Remove trailing whitespace from lines when saving

settings.label: Restore Open Files
settings.description: Reopen previously open files when opening a workspace

settings.label: Max Recent Workspaces
settings.description: Maximum number of recent workspaces to remember

settings.label: Restore Workspace
settings.description: Automatically reopen the last workspace when the app starts

settings.label: Search Debounce
settings.description: Delay in milliseconds before performing search

settings.label: Max Search Results
settings.description: Maximum number of search results to return
